title: Burdine Cluster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Shira_burdine.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] wearing the Burdine Cluster on her collar.]]

The '''Burdine Cluster''' was an award given by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to a member who displayed heroism in battle. [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] was presented this award by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] for her actions on [[Shalyvane]] where she saved her fellow members within [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] from an attack by a horde of [[Em'liy/Legends|Em'liy]]. The award was traditionally accompanied by an advancement in [[Rebel command insignia|rank]].

==Notable recipients==
*[[Lumiya|Shira Brie]] - <small>[[Shalyvane]], [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]</small>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 61|''Star Wars'' (1977) 61]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 61}}
